base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of bebop_rocksteady — a character (boss) from 1991 turtles in time. Bebop + Rocksteady — Stage 5 boss duo (pig + rhino). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
